overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night, passing holographic billboards and storefronts before entering an NCART subway station and interacting with the transit terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with holographic advertisements and construction barriers

events.description: passes the character in white coat who stops near a yellow and black barricade
passes by a pedestrian in a yellow top walking in the opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: walking down the neon-lit street following a pedestrian in a white coat, passing various holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: character in white coat walking ahead, then stopping near a construction barricade
woman in pink athletic outfit walking ahead on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: massive floating holographic billboard displaying an anime character with pink hair and Japanese text
orange and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the street
concrete wall covered in blue and white graffiti tags and street art
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and vertical neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow downtown street at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon lights and holographic advertisements. The camera follows a character in a white coat walking ahead, passing orange construction barriers on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right. The massive anime character billboard dominates the view ahead as the character navigates through sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pawn shop, street vendors, and approaching transit station

events.description: passing the yellow and green pawn shop kiosk with large digital billboard above
slight turn toward the right as the NCART station entrance comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the pawn shop area and street vendors, approaching the NCART station

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing near the pawn shop kiosk entrance
street vendor standing behind a folding table near the building wall

entered.detail: small yellow and green kiosk with teal roof and 'PAWN SHOP' neon signage
large digital screen displaying an advertisement of a man drinking from a cup
distant view of the NCART subway station entrance with green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the commercial street, passing a distinctive yellow pawn shop kiosk on the right with a large digital billboard above it showing a beverage advertisement. Street vendors and small groups of pedestrians occupy the sidewalk. In the distance, the green neon glow of the NCART station entrance becomes visible as the camera approaches the transit hub.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station entrance with covered walkway and green neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered NCART station area from the open street, lighting shifts to green neon
turning to face the NCART terminal doors directly while approaching the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking into the NCART station entrance, passing under the covered concrete structure with green lighting

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the NCART entrance doors

entered.detail: covered station entrance with massive red support beams, concrete pillars, and green neon ceiling lights
purple and yellow automated ticket machines with glowing screens
glass doors with green NCART logo and 'NIGHT CITY AREA RAPID TRANSIT' text

segments.scene_description: The character enters the semi-covered NCART station area, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered space with distinctive green neon lighting and massive red structural beams. Purple ticket vending machines line the right side while the character approaches the glass entrance doors of the subway station. A person sits on the ground near the entrance as the camera turns to face the terminal directly.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station interior with transit terminal interface

events.description: interacting with the NCART terminal, bringing up the holographic metro map interface

agents.ego_description: standing before the NCART terminal as the holographic metro map interface appears and expands

entered.detail: holographic purple and green metro map interface showing NCART transit lines, station names, and destination options
digital display above the doors showing time '04:20' and NCART branding

segments.scene_description: The character stops before the NCART terminal doors and interacts with the interface, causing a large holographic transit map to appear in the center of the frame. The map displays the Night City Area Rapid Transit network with various lines and stations. The environment is now fully indoor with artificial lighting, and the station appears empty of other pedestrians as the interaction completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-drenched downtown street into the sterile, artificial environment of a subway station. It begins by following a character in a white coat through a narrow corridor of towering buildings and holographic advertisements, passing orange construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls. As the character moves further down the commercial strip, the view shifts past a yellow pawn shop kiosk and street vendors toward the distant green glow of the NCART entrance. The scene then transitions from the open street into a sheltered transit hub defined by massive red structural beams and purple ticket machines before turning toward the glass entrance doors. Finally, the camera comes to a halt as the character interacts with the terminal, causing a large holographic transit map to materialize within the quiet, indoor station.
